title: Create - Innovations
description: A modpack packed with incredible create addons for a maximized experience!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7287d553a0513fbab3d54b590fe162766884f19e.png)

# **MODPACK IS NO LONGER BEING MAINTAINED**

## Overview:
**Create Innovations** is a large modpack centered around the Create mod and its expansive ecosystem.
This modpack is made to make you not feel restricted by what you can do in the Create mod, if you want to do something then you should be able to do it. **Create Innovations** even includes many other mods to make the gameplay outside of the create mod fun if that is what you want to do.

## Key Features:  
### Next-Level Automation:
Powered by Create and its numerous add-ons, construct intricate contraptions, massive factories, and imaginative builds with endless mechanical components. Explore Create add-ons like **Crafts & Additions**, and **Steam 'n' Rails**, for expanded functionality.  
### Exploration and Adventure:
Dive into the Nether with **Amplified Nether** and **Incendium**, and explore the revamped overworld with **Terralith** and the End with **Nullscape**. Discover unique mobs, environments, and structures that make every adventure for fun.  
### Customization and Style: 
Use mods like **Chipped**, **Rechiseled**, and **Decorative Blocks** to add artistic flair to your creations. Personalize your gameplay experience with immersive tools like **Sophisticated Backpacks** and **Legendary Tooltips**.  
### Performance and QoL: 
Enjoy smooth gameplay with performance mods such as **Sodium**, **Starlight**, and **FerriteCore**, while quality-of-life mods like **Jade**, and **Inventory Profiles Next** to streamline your experience.  
### Immersive Gameplay Enhancements: 
Dive into dynamic and lifelike interactions with mods like **Sound Physics Remastered**, **Drip Sounds**, and **Falling Leaves**. Enhanced combat, building, and crafting systems ensure every moment feels alive.  

### Unique Additions: 
- **Create Numismatics and Trading Floor**: Introduce economy-focused gameplay with trade networks and currency systems, perfect for multiplayer servers.  
- **Create Big Contraptions and Power Loader**: Push the boundaries of engineering with large-scale contraptions and new ways to automate your creations.  
- **Create Adventures**: Engage in quest-like systems with weekly challenges and rewards to fuel your journey in a multiplayer setting or solo play.  

### Recommended Use: 
This modpack is ideal for server-based communities or solo players looking to combine the thrill of exploration with the joy of building complex machinery. Whether you're creating immersive towns, sprawling automated farms, or massive factories, Create Innovations has something for every kind of player.  

## Unleash your creativity, embrace the spirit of innovation, and redefine what’s possible in Minecraft with **Create Innovations**!
